particulars.description: The property known as mas des figuiers, 178 chemin garrigue redonne, 13210 saint rémy de provence, france, with cadastral references section eo, numbers 5, 6, 9 to 15 and 130, consisting of a rural property with several buildings for housing use, its annexes, swimming-pool and neighbouring plots of land and (ii) agricultural plots located in saint-remy (bouches-du-rhone - 13210), lieudit la garrigue redonne, with cadastral references section hl, numbers 110 and 111.
